problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
